name: Risk X-Ray
blurb: Shows exactly how fast each featured disaster is approaching the TOS cliff, because vibes are a shit compliance system.

name: Auto-Pull Bot
blurb: Yanks featured talent at 90% risk, one merciless tick before they shit on your career in public.

name: PR Firm on Retainer
blurb: A pack of expensive bullshit artists quietly bleeds off regulator heat and invoices you for 'narrative hygiene.'

name: Sixth Slot
blurb: Bribe IT for another front-page slot: more engagement, more chaos, one extra feral adult to babysit.
